Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Bliss]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 9''' — Bliss is an individual Calder Marten was afraid of running into.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 10''' — Bliss possesses a Spear of Tharlos.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 13''' — Bliss is the Guild Head.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 14''' — Bliss is expected to return soon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 14''' — Bliss has pale eyes, pale skin, and white-blond hair.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 14''' — Bliss wears a long black coat with silver buttons etched with the Blackwatch Crest.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 14''' — Bliss is dead according to Calder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 16''' — Bliss is a girl with white-blond hair who was hiding in Calder's clothes chest.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 18''' — Bliss's eyes shine with a pale light when she opens them after closing them briefly.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 19''' — Bliss is a leader or superior within the Blackwatch.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 20''' — Bliss believes a world without an Emperor would be in grave danger.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 28''' — Bliss was fixated on a tiny butterfly of blown glass.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 28''' — Bliss is present during the discussion about the new Emperor.}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 15''' — Bliss is the Head of the Blackwatch Guild.}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 4''' — Bliss is a character on The Testament.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 4''' — Bliss is a character who can hide herself behind casks on the ship.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 6''' — Bliss is a character who helped Calder identify that the eyes on the Navigator's ship were painted.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 6''' — Calder speaks to Bliss about the Optasia.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 10''' — Bliss is immune to the power of Tyrfang.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 11''' — Bliss is a Guild member who issues commands.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 14''' — Bliss supervised the repair of the Optasia.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 20''' — Bliss is a woman with pale hair and wears a Blackwatch coat.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 20''' — Bliss is a person who could help remove Jorin from the fight.}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 5''' — Bliss sent an urgent message via the Watchman.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 13''' — Bliss is on guard duty.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 19''' — Bliss is of the Blackwatch.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 21''' — Bliss uses rough-forged iron spikes as weapons.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 2''' — Bliss has a bone of Tharlos in her pocket.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 4''' — Bliss is a person who might be hiding in a closet.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 4''' — Bliss is notoriously unpredictable.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 5''' — Calder knows what it is like to meet with Bliss.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 7''' — Bliss is someone Calder thinks might be able to help.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 7''' — Bliss has the potential to end the entire conflict on her own.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 7''' — Bliss was named Steward.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 7''' — Bliss possesses a Soulbound Vessel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 7''' — Bliss reported that the last Consultants to escape were carrying something.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 9''' — Bliss has stabbed a decorative sword into a wall.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 9''' — Bliss is a character who interacts with Calder and Cheska.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 9''' — Bliss is helping Calder start using the Optasia without breaking his brain.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 11''' — Bliss did not dash out of the room when commanded.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 13''' — Bliss woke from a nightmare.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 13''' — Bliss's cell label was #4162B.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 13''' — Bliss has the ability to change her location.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 13''' — Bliss can cleanse her blood to remove foreign agents.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 13''' — Bliss was poisoned with a substance that inhibits judgment and cognitive functions.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 19''' — Bliss's form was seen among the figures ascending into the void.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 23''' — Bliss wears a Blackwatch coat.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 23''' — Bliss is a character who was tucked away in the rigging of The Testament.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 23''' — Bliss is the daughter of Nathanael Bareius.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 23''' — Bliss intends to get revenge on Nathanael Bareius.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 24''' — Bliss stayed curled up in the rigging of The Testament.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 4''' — Bliss is considered notoriously unreliable.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 14''' — Bliss possesses a black iron spike.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 20''' — There is a suggestion to remove Bliss.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 24''' — Bliss possesses a spear of yellowed bone.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
